Requirement Source (US/AC): Busy Homeowner
AC: Detect and collect leaves, small debris, and lightweight trash.
System Requirement (SR): SR-COLLECT-01: The robot must be capable of identifying and physically collecting common outdoor debris.
Design Component (DC): DC-M-01: Intake/Collection Mechanism (Brush Rollers & Suction) + DC-S-01: Vision System (Object Detection Model)

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: Operate autonomously during scheduled hours.
System Requirement (SR): SR-AUTO-01: The system must support user-defined scheduling for autonomous operation.
Design Component (DC): DC-SW-01: Scheduler/Mission Control Module (Real-Time OS Task)

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: Navigate safely around obstacles (vehicles, garden decor, pets, etc.).
System Requirement (SR): SR-NAV-01: The robot must implement obstacle avoidance using sensors to safely navigate around dynamic and static barriers.
Design Component (DC): DC-S-02: Obstacle Sensor Suite (LIDAR or Ultrasonic) + DC-A-01: Path Planning Algorithm (DWA or RRT)

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: Return to a charging dock automatically when finished or low on power.
System Requirement (SR): SR-PWR-01: The robot must be able to automatically return to a designated charging or docking station upon completion or low power.
Design Component (DC): DC-S-03: Docking Beacon/IR Sensor + DC-HW-01: Battery Management System (BMS)

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: Provide a notification or status update when cleanup is complete.
System Requirement (SR): SR-UI-01: The system must provide users with cleanup status notifications via a mobile/web interface.
Design Component (DC): DC-COMM-01: Wi-Fi/Cellular Communication Module + DC-SW-02: Status Reporting API

Requirement Source (US/AC): Beach Security Officer
AC: Detect and safely collect glass, plastic, metal, and other hazardous items.
System Requirement (SR): SR-COLLECT-02: The collection mechanism must be robust enough to safely handle and contain heavier/harder debris.
Design Component (DC): DC-M-02: Robust Intake System & Reinforced Waste Bin Liner

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: Operate within designated zones without interfering with beachgoers or restricted areas.
System Requirement (SR): SR-GEO-01: The robot must operate within user-defined geo-fenced boundaries and cease operation if it attempts to leave.
Design Component (DC): DC-S-04: GPS Module + DC-A-02: Geo-Fencing Algorithm

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: Send real-time location and activity updates to security monitoring systems.
System Requirement (SR): SR-UI-02: The system must transmit real-time operational data (location, status) accessible by a central monitoring system.
Design Component (DC): DC-COMM-02: Real-time Telemetry Link + DC-SW-03: Monitoring Dashboard API

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: Automatically pauses or reroutes if human presence or wildlife is detected nearby.
System Requirement (SR): SR-NAV-02: The robot must detect and temporarily adjust its path or pause operation when human presence or wildlife is in close proximity.
Design Component (DC): DC-S-05: High-Resolution Cameras/Vision System + DC-A-03: People/Animal Detection Model (ML)

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: Return to a secure docking station for maintenance or charging.
System Requirement (SR): SR-PWR-02: The docking station must be physically secure and accessible only by authorized personnel.
Design Component (DC): DC-HW-02: Docking Station Physical Security (Lock/Access Control)

Requirement Source (US/AC): Environmentalist Group
AC: Identify and sort collected debris (plastic, paper, glass, organic).
System Requirement (SR): SR-COLLECT-03: The robot must incorporate a mechanism for on-board sorting of collected debris based on material type.
Design Component (DC): DC-M-03: On-board Sorting Mechanism (Mechanical Arms/Conveyor) + DC-S-06: Material Sensor Array (IR/Spectroscopy)

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: Operate using solar or rechargeable power to minimize environmental footprint.
System Requirement (SR): SR-PWR-03: The robot must be powered by a rechargeable battery system, with the option for supplementary solar charging.
Design Component (DC): DC-HW-03: Solar Panel Array + DC-HW-04: High-Capacity Lithium Battery

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: Avoid disrupting natural habitats, nests, or marine life near the shoreline.
System Requirement (SR): SR-ENV-01: The robot's movement and collection methods must be designed to avoid physical disturbance of ecologically sensitive areas.
Design Component (DC): DC-M-04: Low Ground-Pressure Chassis Design (Wide Tires/Tracks)

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: Provide daily cleanup reports with data on waste types and volumes collected.
System Requirement (SR): SR-DATA-01: The system must generate daily reports detailing the type and estimated volume of collected debris.
Design Component (DC): DC-SW-04: Data Logging and Report Generation Module

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: Integrate with an environmental dashboard for long-term trend analysis.
System Requirement (SR): SR-DATA-02: The collected data must be exportable in a standard format (e.g., JSON, CSV).
Design Component (DC): DC-SW-05: Data Export API (for external dashboard integration)

Requirement Source (US/AC): Groundskeeper
AC: Identify and collect small trash items and debris.
System Requirement (SR): (Covered by SR-COLLECT-01)
Design Component (DC): (Covered by DC-M-01, DC-S-01)

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: Operate autonomously during selected hours.
System Requirement (SR): (Covered by SR-AUTO-01)
Design Component (DC): (Covered by DC-SW-01)

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: Notify the user when cleanup is complete.
System Requirement (SR): (Covered by SR-UI-01)
Design Component (DC): (Covered by DC-SW-02)

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: Operate within designated areas and avoids running over gardens and flowerbeds.
System Requirement (SR): SR-GEO-02: The robot must have the capability to map and identify prohibited areas and navigate to exclude them from the cleaning route.
Design Component (DC): DC-A-04: Exclusion Zone Mapping Algorithm (User-defined map input)

Requirement Source (US/AC): President of Howard University
AC: The robot will be able to identify and sort trash and debris.
System Requirement (SR): (Covered by SR-COLLECT-03)
Design Component (DC): (Covered by DC-M-03, DC-S-06)

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: It can operate autonomously during selected hours.
System Requirement (SR): (Covered by SR-AUTO-01)
Design Component (DC): (Covered by DC-SW-01)

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: It can navigate the area and can move between two different terrains.
System Requirement (SR): SR-MECH-01: The physical design must allow for smooth transition and reliable operation across varied outdoor terrains.
Design Component (DC): DC-M-05: All-Terrain Drive System (High-Torque Motors & Independent Suspension)

Requirement Source (US/AC): AC: It operates in the designated area and can avoid bumping into things and people.
System Requirement (SR): (Covered by SR-GEO-01 and SR-NAV-01)
Design Component (DC): (Covered by DC-S-04, DC-A-02, DC-S-02, DC-A-01)
